guardrails.title: Restrict GITHUB_TOKEN Permissions
guardrails.body: Workflows shall explicitly set `permissions` to the minimum required scope. Do not rely on the default broad permissions of GITHUB_TOKEN.

guardrails.title: No Untrusted Input in Run Blocks
guardrails.body: Do not directly interpolate externally-sourced values (e.g. `${{ github.event.*.title }}`) in `run:` blocks. Pass them via environment variables to prevent script injection.

guardrails.title: No pull_request_target with Checkout
guardrails.body: Do not check out and execute PR code under the `pull_request_target` trigger. This exposes secrets to untrusted code from forks.
